name: Basic Confirmate Security Guidelines
description: A lightweight security catalog reusing existing assessment metrics for baseline compliance checks. Demonstrates metric reuse across catalogs.

categories.name: Access Control & Authentication
categories.description: Basic access control and authentication requirements.

controls.name: Access Control Mechanisms
controls.description: The product must implement access control mechanisms for all critical functionalities.

controls.name: Authorization Checks
controls.description: All endpoints must have authorization checks on their path.

controls.name: Password Policy
controls.description: A strong password policy must be enforced.

controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: MFA must be available for administrative accounts.

categories.name: Data Protection
categories.description: Requirements for protecting data at rest and in transit.

controls.name: Encryption
controls.description: Data must be encrypted at rest and in transit.

controls.name: Encryption at Rest
controls.description: Sensitive data must be encrypted at rest.

controls.name: Encryption in Transit
controls.description: All external communication must use strong encryption.

controls.name: Cryptographic Algorithm Strength
controls.description: Only strong cryptographic algorithms must be used.

categories.name: Security Updates
categories.description: Requirements for keeping the product up to date.

controls.name: Update Management
controls.description: The product must support security updates.

controls.name: Automatic Updates
controls.description: Automatic updates must be enabled by default.

controls.name: Update Check Interval
controls.description: The product must check for updates at appropriate intervals.

categories.name: Logging & Monitoring
categories.description: Requirements for security logging and monitoring.
